entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: I've decided to land you a helping hand.

entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: You might've noticed the new slot machines last time you were here. They don't give you money, however if you win in them, I will send some of my... let's just say goons to put some extra loot in the basement for you to find.

entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: Why can't they clean up the basement themselves then? Well...

entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: And that, kids, is why you should return the money you borrow from me in time, tehe.

entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: Anyway, there are six types of machines I got installed: weapons, armor, potions, miscellaneous tools - these are pretty self-explanatory.

entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: There's also one that I will give you a bigger backpack for every time you win, allowing you to carry more stuff. There is a chance for you to fail so spectacularly that I will actually swap it with a smaller one though, it's not interesting if there's no risk.

entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: ...oh and there is also one in the back, I don't know what that does, the guy who installed it was very unclear about that. Try and see I guess.

entries.speaker: Casino Master
entries.text: Anyway, if you keep bringing me those chips I'll reward you for them. Good luck.
